summary: Backend-only validation of Jan-2026 Global Vibez DSG iteration: VibeRidez auto-payout + driver_lat/lon contract, NO_DRIVERS branch, /ridez/driver-location, /vibe-suites/me/balance auth gating (Bearer + cookie), /crypto-payments/platform-receive-wallet, SOL vs BTC create-deposit contract, and router-registration regression smoke. All 13 pytest cases passed against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: vibe_ridez_dispatch.py: in-memory _DRIVERS dict resets on every backend restart — driver earnings/state are non-persistent. Acceptable for demo, but call out before any monetary go-live.
vibe_ridez_dispatch.py:155 driver_location() reads _DRIVERS without acquiring _DRIVERS_LOCK. Race-prone but low-impact (read-only); consider snapshot under lock for consistency.

vibe_ridez_dispatch.py request_ride() auto-credits BEFORE the ride is actually completed — driver gets paid the moment they accept. This is the intended UX per the spec, but creates an obvious abuse vector (accept-then-cancel) once real drivers are wired in. Add a pending/escrow state before production.
crypto_payments.py:113 stores `expires_at` as a float epoch but `created_at` as ISO string — inconsistent timestamp format in the same document.

crypto_payments.py BTC/ETH branches still emit a placeholder 'GENERATED_ADDRESS_*' rather than calling a real on-chain address generator — fine for demo, must be wired before non-Solana deposits go live.
vibe_suites.py /me/balance is fine, but token_balance defaults silently to 0 if the user document has no field — frontend must distinguish 'never funded' from 'no account row' if that matters.
test_credentials: Used /api/auth/demo-login (no static credentials required). johnnyh3611@gmail.com / FreshStart2026! is available in /app/memory/test_credentials.md if a real user is needed later.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed in-memory drivers and TEST_-prefixed crypto_deposits rows (SOL + BTC) in MongoDB. Driver state is in-memory and clears on backend restart; crypto_deposits rows persist but are clearly TEST_-prefixed for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter_global_vibez_dsg_2026_01.py covers all 7 review-request items. Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter_global_vibez_dsg_2026_01.py -v. Frontend was explicitly out-of-scope this iteration (preview ingress timing out on 38MB webpack-dev bundle per E1's note). VibeRidez driver state is in-memory so each test self-registers its driver via POST /api/ridez/status before exercising the dispatcher.
